# NeXTSTEP / OPENSTEP 4.2 — dock, Workspace Manager, file viewer

**Clawmachine-fit rating:** A

**Notes:** Dark chrome, 3D bevels, monospaced UI type. Anti-platinum. The 'pro workstation' voice for panels and inspectors.

**Credits / sources:** GUIdebook Gallery, toastytech.com (Nathan Lineback), Paul Lynch MacUser scans, ArchiveOS.

**Use:** internal non-commercial fair-use design reference only. Do not redistribute.
